text:
횧횇횚횞횇횘 26 횜횕횞횚횇횓횠 2006 17:25, David Sledge 횓횁횖횋횙횁횞:
> The assemble and package ant scripts now write the files to the eclipse
> directory 

Cool! Are they mv-ing, ln-ing, or cp-ing, though?.. We can beat this to death 
while the port-freeze is in effect, you know :-) Thanks for the hard work!

	-mi
